feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation -Automatic Creation of Sales Orders from Excel
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

As a part of SAP BTP Trial version, we are working on activating Build process automation bot -Automatic Creation of Sales Orders from Excel (4G5)

The target instance on which the BOT is deployed is S/4HANA on premise system, We are referring to below SAP link 

https://help.sap.com/docs/IRPA_S4HANA/1ba1de4bdbae4d3b85c71d1408c95f66/9e4f182ff2ae4eaa94eabd5d3a67acbd.html?q=Automatic%20Creation%20of%20Sales%20Orders%20from%20Excel

I have the following questions

1) What  should be entered as SYSTEMURL_ODATA ?  Sample value mentioned in product documentation is https://<System>-api.<domain>/sap/opu/odata/sap . Which api should be mentioned here. Can some one help with the exact string ?

 

2) For on -premise system what is meant by  technical user ?

 

3) For on -premise scenarios does API_SALES_ORDER_SRV/A_SalesOrderInformation needs to be activated specifically and any users assigned ?

 

Could some one point to step by step details for on-premise systems ?

 

Thanks & Regards

Amit Kulkarni

entry.title: How to setup SAP Build process automation action project and cap multi tenant application?
entry.content:
In tutorial Create an action project using the OpenAPI specification of a simple CAP Service the configuration of an action-project/action to access a simple CAP application in the same BTP subaccount  than the SAP Build process automation service/subscription is described.

But what if the CAP application is a multi tenant application, where the application provider is in the same  subaccount than the SAP Build process automation service (and SAP Build process automation subscription) and multiple subscriber of the CAP application are located in their own BTP subaccount. 

How is the SAP Build process automation setup/configuration in this case?

entry.title: API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV - Calling from Build Process Automation/ Build Process
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

we are trying to explore the option of using the API - API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV to create Production Orders for a requirement using Build Process. we are working on S4 Hana on Premise .

we are able to establish the connection from our Sandbox to Build Process and able to call the API - API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV - Reading the Production Order Information using GET Method works fine from Build Process.

for creation of Production Order - we are trying to use the POST Method.

1. Manufacturing Order is mandatory for the API to test it from Build Process even though we are trying to create the Production order. This is not the same if we test the API using Gateway method. I tried to pass some dummy number to this field.

2. Total Quantity field - we are receiving the error. Below is the error which we are receiving when we try to test the POST Method under Actions 

Failed to read property 'TotalQuantity' at offset '81'

 

Really appreciate if you can provide some guidance.

 

Thanks,

Adi

entry.title: Re: API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV - Calling from Build Proce...
SAP Build Process Automation - Error on action 'Deployment is not activated'
entry.content:
Hi, I'm developing a workflow that use an action to do GET e PUT call via API REST on a SAP System.

Yesterday all worked fine, but today, after some changes on phases after action call, I obtain this error

Action Identifier:get_zwf_sped
Destination:sap_process_automation_sap_bc
Error message:Action 'b6b0f645-5f66-460d-adb9-315d01106fc4' failed with the following error: 'Deployment is not activated'.
 
The Action is deployed and works fine when I test it.
Process is correctly deployed.
 
What means this error?
Giampaolo

entry.title: Error in SBPA: Action 'XXXX' failed with the following error: 'Deployment is not activated'.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have created a SAP Build Process Automation. The Process was working fine but all of a sudden the process is struck in error status after triggering. I am using an API to send information to CPI using Actions. The error says Action 'XXXX' failed with the following error: 'Deployment is not activated'. As per the error, I have checked the Project and it is Deployed and Active. I have tested the Action separately and it also works fine. I have checked everything and it all looks fine.

Could you please help me understand the issue and provide solution ?

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: SAP iRPA Process Kept Hanging
entry.content:
Hi everyone, recently I have noticed my clients bot kept on hitting the maximum amount of time which is 2 hours to complete an automation. This bot is an unattended bot running on a physical machine which runs every 30 minutes.

When looking into the Monitoring page, I can see there's a lot of Failed (Due to exceed amount of duration) and Expired (Only waits for 1 hour).

When checking the bot physically on my client site, I can see the bot just hangs not doing anything. Does this issue happened to anyone else?

entry.title: scheduling interval in visibility scenario
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is there a way to change the interval of visibility scenario from 5 minutes to lesser time?

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Support-SAP-Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Team ,

 

I do have the below mentioned SAP Universal Id(30 days validity) and was trying to explore SAP Build Process Automation.

ID : 703237194@genpact.com

 

Request you to provide assistance regarding Sap Build process automation(Web)

https://guided-experience-spa-eu10.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/studio/#f58c9285-68f8-4fcd-95c3-bfb5a7a2a789/#ef05b8fc-efb5-4c01-be3b-a16cb9f84a75

As I am unable to use the actions to do the automation.(POV)

entry.title: Destination for on premise service in sap build process automation
entry.content:
Hi,

I Created RAP Service in my on premise system.

I created a destination of type on premise and manage to create an action project.

When I tested the action before deploying it - it worked.

I combined the action in my process, using the same destination I used to create and test the action project (with on premise proxy) and I got an error saying that only Internet proxy type is supported.

I created new destination that is the same as the old one but with internet in proxy type, but now I get a message "get addrinnfo ENOTFOUND"

Anyone can tell me what I am doing wrong?

Thanks in advance

SAP Build Process Automation 

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: Build Process Automation - Handle Timeout of SAPUI5 Screen
entry.content:
Hello, I am fairly new to BPA and I am stuck on a problem I encountered.

I am automating a SAPUI5 Application, and I have multiple "Wait Ready(SAPUI5 Screen)" in my project for when the application is fetching backend data. The problem is that I need to handle a Timeout scenario. I have an "Or Error" node where I need to execute series of other steps when the timeout happens. However I am getting this message when I try to execute another automation from the Error node : "An asynchronous activity in a custom script may have failed. Add an await operator before each SDK activity call. Error: Wait Ready " Timeout error: Waiting for screen(s) xxx to appear (30 s)". Message mentions Custom script even though I did not use any and the On Error automation never executes. Could you please help ?

entry.title: Migration of Rules from BRMS to SAP Build Process Automation Manage Rules Project or Decision
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am looking for best practise for migration of rules from BRMS to SAP BPA .

As I see there are couple of options  

a. Decision b. Manage Rule Projects

Here are the scenarios and which tools should be the best practise ?

  1.  We have few  projects which are SAP IRPA we are migrating to BPA . IRPA projects called BRMS via API . What would be a better approach here to import BRMS rules into MRP and use the API call to invoke the rules or convert the rules to decision or restructure and design the whole automation in order to use decisions ?
  2. In case there are CAPM or other application which are consuming BRMS via API what would be a better approach Decision or Manage Rule Project

Few generic questions 

  1. Rules in Manage rule projects can be transported across tenant via CTMS
  2. How do we achieve maintainability of decision in production tenant
  3. In case of Manage Rule Project we see + ( Create Rule) button is disabled so incase if new rule need to be added how can we achieve the same ?

Also best practise document or link for Manage Rule Projects and Decision will be helpful.

 

Please guide.

 

Regards,

Gaurang

entry.title: Hiding Workflow Step Names in Business Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Background:
 
  • We are using SAP Business Process Automation (BPA) in SAP BTP
  • In the My Inbox UI, step names associated with each task are currently displayed at the bottom of open tasks. 

  •  

Objective:

  • We want to hide the step names defined in the workflow from the UI.

Steps Taken So Far:

  1. Workflow Configuration:

    • We have explored the workflow configuration within BPA.
    • We identified the specific step/task for which we want to hide the name .

       

       

  2. UI Customization:

    • We attempted to locate the relevant UI code responsible for rendering the step names.
    • However, we couldn’t find the exact place to make the necessary adjustments.

Request:

  • Have any of you had the same problem and found a possible resolution?
  • Specifically, we want to exclude the step names from the UI while ensuring that the workflow functionality remains intact.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP iRPA Outlook Email Search Criterion - how to add OR Condition
entry.content:
Hi

Is there a way to add multiple Email Search Criterias but with OR condition? Currently, if you mention 2-3 search conditions, by default it takes them as AND conditions and the search happens accordingly. 

I need to add multiple search critera, but using OR condition. Does it allow such functionality? 

Thanks

Sandip

entry.title: How to export DOX templates from SAP RPA to SAP BUILD
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am moving to SAP BUILD after 2,5 years of using SAP RPA and as I perfectly managed to import my projects, I am facing some difficulties with those using DOX templates.

As far as I understood, SAP RPA and SAP BUILD cannot coexist in the same subaccount in BTP cockpit, so I installed SAP BUILD in another subaccount. What should I do to have my DOX templates available in my imported projects? Should I set up DOX in a certain way in the new subaccount, using the same service key maybe? Export/import them manually? Please note that I cannot export any of my templates on DOX UI, each attempt resulting in a pop up saying:

Thanks beforehand for your help.

BR,

LM.

entry.title: Send email through Sharedmail box Outlook
entry.content:
Hi Team,

There is a requirement to use shared mailboxes to send emails.These mailboxes has two entry point-Primary and secondary address.
Is it possible to use secondary email address to send emails using Outlook?
I have added the account to outlook using secondary email address however send email fails with error "account not found in outlook session"

entry.title: Could not upload the document for information extraction: The templates(s) used for detection are de
entry.content:
I am getting an error message on Extract Data(template) task when I am running the automation in quality tenant. "Could not upload the document for information extraction: The templates(s) used for detection are deactivated"

When I run the automation in Development tenant, automation runs without any errors.

Also, I can confirm that all the templates in QE1 tenant are active. 

However, whenever I click on any one of the templates then I am getting below error: 

  • "SAP_IPA_28003: The requested template could not be found in the Document Extraction Service. It might have been deleted." 

Kindly help.

entry.title: SAP Process Automation - Unattended mode after restart
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I would need your help with unattended mode in SBPA.

After each installation of security patches on a dedicated station running the SBPA Desktop Agent in unattended mode, we must log in to the tenant. I've looked through the available materials, but I can't find a way to bypass authentication or use saved login data. If any of you know a working procedure, please respond. The instructions show something, but I actually couldn't get it to work. If you haven't tried it, please do not write your opinion.

Thank you very much & kindest regards, JV

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: SAP Process Automation - Opening PDF file unhandled exception in case of BadStreamError
entry.content:
Dear SBPA DecOps Team,

Could anyone have a look to the following case?

In case we try to process corrupted PDF file, unhandled exception causes the automation stops and it is impossible to use Try..Catch to manage it. The detailed error message follows, however we use Cloud Studio and latest PDF SDK. Any suggestion?

Thank you very much, JV

SAP Build Process Automation 

 

An asynchronous activity in a custom script may have failed. Add an await operator before each SDK activity call. Error: This error originated either by throwing inside of an async function without a catch block, or by rejecting a promise which was not handled with .catch(). The promise rejected with the reason "FormatError: Bad encoding in flate stream".
  • An asynchronous activity in a custom script may have failed. Add an await operator before each SDK activity call. Error: This error originated either by throwing inside of an async function without a catch block, or by rejecting a promise which was not handled with .catch(). The promise rejected with the reason "FormatError: Bad encoding in flate stream".
 
Date: 5/24/2024, 05:37:46 PM

entry.title: Capturing the approval form status on SAP BPA (Build Process Automation)
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a question about SAP Build Process Automation (BPA). If I create an approval form with options to approve or reject, can I capture the approval status and integrate it with SAP Build Apps?

Specifically, I want to display statuses such as 'Approved', 'Rejected', and 'Pending' in SAP Build Apps. 'Approved' if the user clicks approve, 'Rejected' if the user clicks reject, and 'Pending' if the user hasn't clicked approve or reject yet.

My guess is that we can retrieve the status by create an action. If so, how the configuration will be? Or are there any existing functionalities within SAP BPA for capturing and retrieving approval form status, like using output of the form?

Also, I notice there are processes in the flow function, is that more convenient to use for this use case?

Best regards,
Isyraf
